---
title: "Eliakim Littell"
---

## Eliakim Littell

**Dates:** (1797-1870)

### Description

publisher in Philadelphia

### Biography

He was founder and proprietor of <i>Littell\'s Living Age</i>, a serial which reprinted fiction, often pirating English authors, including Dickens, Gaskell and CMY.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 3d 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
